calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jul-22-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Judge Wallace P. Douglass, Clerk: V. Mack, Bailiff: Anna Payne, Not Reported
APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff Salvadore Burton, father and guardian ad litem for son Michael Burton, also present.
Carol Robinson, Claims Manager CCMS I and Jennifer Roffle, Educational Placement Center appear on behalf of the San Francisco Unified School District.
Jonathan Varnica, CCSF Intern and Sonny Koya, CCSF Intern, appear on behalf of CCSF.

The parties and witnesses are sworn. Plaintiff calls the following witnesses to testify: Craig Cummins, Sam Edwards, Maurice Lewis and Valerie Tulier, J.D.

Carol Robinson and Jennifer Roffle testify on behalf of SFUSD.

Plaintiff's exhibits, unmarked, are returned to plaintiff. The court advises the representatives for City and County of San Francisco that the amended claim against CCSF will be dismissed.

The matter stands submitted.

For Amended Small Claims Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Set For Trial On Jun-30-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 504

SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Continued To Jul-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 504
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff appeared in Pro per
CCSF appeared with Jonathan Varnica and Sonny Koya (both Interns)



Judge: Wallace Douglass
Clerk: Don Feinberg

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
